# Elite Auto Service — Salem, OR
> Elite Auto Service is an auto repair shop in Salem, Oregon — diagnostics, brakes, oil, engine and transmission, with up-front estimates. Bilingual (English/Spanish). 930 Commercial St NE. Call (503) 602-7178. A downtown shop on Commercial St — up-front estimates and bilingual techs.

## Services
- Diagnostics & Check Engine
- Brakes
- Oil & Maintenance
- Engine & Transmission
- Heating & A/C
- Tires & Alignment

## Service area
- Salem, Keizer, West Salem, Marion County (ZIPs: 97301)

## Contact
- Call/text: (503) 602-7178 · Hours: Mon–Fri 8am–5:30pm · Sat–Sun closed · Languages: English, Español

## FAQ
### Do you give estimates before the work?
Yes &mdash; we diagnose first and give you an up-front estimate before any work starts.

### Do you work on all makes and models?
We service most makes and models &mdash; tell us your vehicle and we'll confirm.

### Do you speak Spanish?
Yes &mdash; our team is bilingual and can help entirely in Spanish.

### How long will my repair take?
It depends on the job &mdash; we give you a time estimate with your quote.

### Can I wait or get a ride?
Ask us when you book and we'll let you know your options.
